privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring Odoo to automate service product-to-project creation. Customer: Titanium Manufacturing. Service product: Logistics Site Audit ($2500). Physical product: Industrial Barcode Scanner ($450 each, qty 5). Expected total order value: $4750 untaxed. All data is synthetic, created during task setup via Odoo XML-RPC API. The task requires creating the service product, processing a mixed sales order, verifying project automation, delivering physical goods, and invoicing the complete order.
